title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 50.430 - Commission determination final, when — interest — misdemeanor
text:
50.430.  Commission determination final, when — interest — misdemeanor. — Unless the delinquent appear on the first day of the next succeeding term and show good cause for setting aside such settlement, same shall become final and the amount found due shall bear interest at the rate of thirty percent per annum until paid.  Such delinquent shall, moreover, be deemed guilty of a misdemeanor in office and proceeded against accordingly.
(RSMo 1939 § 13819, A. 1949 H.B. 2007) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12157; 1919 § 9555; 1909 § 3776
